---
title: "Data Steward"
subtitle: "Data Steward"
image: ben.jpg
image-alt: "Photo of the Data Steward"
skills:
  - R
  - Quarto
  - Team Leadership
  - System Design
projects:
  - title: "Cloud Migration Platform"
    url: "/projects/cloud-migration"
  - title: "Microservices Framework"
    url: "/projects/microservices"
  - title: "Developer Portal"
    url: "/projects/dev-portal"
categories:
  - Leadership
  - Engineering
---
